description: Manage Supabase Storage buckets and objects via AI-powered MCP tools.
author: supabase
installation: Set SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY in the MCP config.

name: Cloudflare R2 MCP
description: Access and manage Cloudflare R2 object storage for zero-egress-cost storage.
author: cloudflare
installation: Set Cloudflare API token and R2 bucket name in the MCP config.

name: AWS S3 MCP
description: List, upload, and retrieve objects from AWS S3 buckets via AI-assisted MCP.
author: awslabs
installation: Configure AWS credentials and bucket access in the MCP server.

name: Zed Editor MCP
description: Integrate AI features into the Zed high-performance code editor via MCP protocol.
author: zed-industries
installation: Configure MCP servers in Zed's settings.json.

name: VS Code MCP Extension
description: Use MCP servers directly inside VS Code with Copilot and GitHub AI features.
author: microsoft
installation: Open .vscode/mcp.json and add your MCP server configurations.

name: Cursor MCP Integration
description: Connect MCP servers to Cursor IDE for AI-powered code context and tool use.
author: cursor
installation: Configure MCP servers in Cursor's ~/.cursor/mcp.json settings.

name: Apify MCP
description: Use 3,000+ pre-built cloud tools for web extraction and data workflows via Apify Actors.
author: apify
installation: Set APIFY_TOKEN and configure the Actors MCP server.

name: Bright Data MCP
description: Access reliable, real-time web data at scale using Bright Data's proxy and scraping network.
author: brightdata
installation: Set BRIGHTDATA_API_TOKEN and configure the MCP server.

name: ZenRows MCP
description: Scrape websites at scale without blocks using ZenRows' anti-bot web scraping API.
author: zenrows
installation: Set ZENROWS_API_KEY and configure the MCP server.

name: Zulip MCP
description: Send messages, read streams, and manage topics in Zulip team chat via AI.
author: zulip
installation: Set ZULIP_EMAIL, ZULIP_API_KEY, and ZULIP_SITE in the MCP config.

name: Microsoft Teams MCP
description: Send messages, read chats, and manage Teams channels via AI-powered MCP integration.
author: microsoft
installation: Configure Microsoft Graph API credentials and configure the MCP server.

name: OpenStreetMap MCP
description: Query OpenStreetMap for geocoding, POIs, routes, and geographic data.
author: jtrokel
installation: No API key required. Mount the server and start querying OSM data.

name: DeepSeek MCP
description: Access DeepSeek reasoning and chat models via MCP for cost-effective AI inference.
author: deepseek-ai
installation: Set DEEPSEEK_API_KEY and configure the MCP server.

name: Ollama MCP
description: Run local LLMs via Ollama and expose them as MCP tools for offline AI inference.
author: patruff
installation: Run Ollama locally and configure the MCP server with your host URL.

name: HuggingFace MCP
description: Access and run HuggingFace models and Inference API endpoints via MCP.
author: huggingface

name: ArXiv Search MCP
description: Search and retrieve academic papers from ArXiv for AI, ML, and scientific research.

installation: No API key required. Mount the server in your MCP configuration.

name: PubMed MCP
description: Search and retrieve biomedical literature from PubMed and NCBI databases.

name: Semantic Scholar MCP
description: Search 200M+ academic papers with Semantic Scholar's AI-powered research index.
author: allenai
installation: Optionally set S2_API_KEY for higher rate limits.

name: Redis Cloud MCP
description: Manage Redis Cloud subscriptions, databases, and access control via AI.
author: redis

name: CockroachDB Serverless MCP
